  "findings": [
    "T&P discharge pipe is missing, trapped, reduced in size, or terminates too high above the floor/drain."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reinstall the T&P discharge piping using an approved material of equal or greater diameter than the valve outlet.",
    "Ensure the line runs entirely gravity-drained with no traps.",
    "Terminate the discharge pipe pointing down, no more than 6 inches above the floor or waste receptor, in accordance with code."
  ],
  "rationale": "The Temperature and Pressure (T&P) relief valve discharge piping must be installed to prevent scalding hazards and system explosions. Code prohibits reducing the pipe size, trapping the line, or terminating it too high above the floor or drain.",
  "references": [
    "IPC 504.6",
    "IRC P2804.6.1"
  ]
}
